summary: Completed testing of Break-Even APIs and Order Print functionality. All 12 backend tests passed. Frontend Break-Even Report page working correctly. Fixed Dashboard.js console error for delayed orders API.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.js had a bug accessing res.data.stats.total_delayed when API returns empty array - FIXED
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Category and TEST_Product for order creation tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Break-Even APIs tested: GET /api/break-even/daily, GET /api/break-even/monthly-summary. Branch fixed costs update tested: PUT /api/branches/{id}. Order creation tested: POST /api/orders. All tests pass. Demo account: demo@maestroegp.com / demo123. Super admin: owner@maestroegp.com / owner123 (Secret Key: 271018).

features_tested.break_even_daily_api: PASS - Returns daily target, profit, coverage percentage, branch details with fixed costs breakdown
features_tested.break_even_monthly_api: PASS - Returns monthly summary with all branches
features_tested.branch_fixed_costs_update: PASS - PUT /api/branches/{id} correctly saves rent_cost, electricity_cost, water_cost, generator_cost
features_tested.order_creation_print: PASS - POST /api/orders creates order successfully (simulating print save)
features_tested.break_even_report_page: PASS - /break-even page displays daily target, profit, coverage percentage correctly
features_tested.settings_branch_edit: PASS - Fixed costs fields exist in branch edit dialog (الإيجار, الكهرباء, الماء, المولدة)

break_even_calculation_verified.formula: Daily Target = (rent + electricity + water + generator) / 30 + (total salaries / 30)
